emails.subject: RE: Carole Frank's Letter of Recommendation
emails.body: RE: Carole Frank's Letter of Recommendation Let me know what you think. Please add any changes you want. DG

emails.subject: RE: Carole Frank's Letter of Recommendation
emails.body: Darron, Thank you so much. It is an awesome letter. I appreciate the time and effort you spent. One favor...do you think you could ask your admin to put the letter on letterhead? Jeff wants hard copies, and I thought stationary would look nice. If not, I can ask her. Irena, right? Thanks again. Have fun in Chicago and tell Phillip hi for me! Carole

emails.subject: RE: Carole Frank's Letter of Recommendation
